model_selection.reason: The 35M-parameter MoGe-2 normal model is the smallest official normal-capable model and is appropriate for a 2 GiB GPU.

notes: The venv inherits the detected CUDA-enabled PyTorch stack to avoid duplicating a large machine-specific torch installation. MoGe and its Git dependencies are installed from requirements-moge.lock.txt with --no-deps. Run pip freeze in .venv for the complete resolved environment.
